item.title: Modules
item.description: Index of the 18 ASCIA OS functional modules from the Specifications document

item.title: Open Questions
item.description: Ambiguities, contradictions, and follow-up items found across the ASCIA documentation set

item.title: Glossary
item.description: Flat alphabetical glossary of every term and acronym across the ASCIA documentation

item.title: Origin Email
item.description: Handoff email to the agency listing all attached docs and MVP exclusions

item.title: MVP Exclusions
item.description: Sections explicitly excluded from MVP per the handoff email

item.title: MVP Scope
item.description: What is included in the MVP — Phase 1, 4-6 months

item.title: Roadmap and Phases
item.description: Phase 0 → Phase 4 development roadmap across ~24 months

item.title: Response Process
item.description: 5-stage selection process — NDA, questions, proposal, presentation, decision

item.title: Confidentiality
item.description: NDA before specs, no unapproved subcontractors, 5-year post-contract confidentiality

item.title: Intellectual Property
item.description: All work belongs to ASCIA Inc. from creation — no reuse permitted
